dataValidation.prompt: This attribute indicates the SKU number as assigned by the contributor
Select the appropriate product type that best suits the item
Specify the type of operation to be actioned on the data provided
Specify whether a SKU is a parent or child
The SKU of the parent item
Specify the variation theme that the product will use. The theme's attributes must be populated for all items in the grouping.
Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing
Provide the brand name of the product
Select the type of external ID (barcode) type or ASIN that is being used to identify this product. If the product is exempt from external ID, select GTIN Exempt.
Provide the corresponding product id value based on the type that was selected

Indicate the browse node or section of the Amazon website where the product will be assigned. This allows customers to find the product on the website easily. If you don't provide a node or if you provide an incorrect node, customers may not be able to...

Indicate the browse node or section of the Amazon website where the product will be assigned. This allows customers to find the product on the website easily. If you don't provide a node or if you provide an incorrect node, customers may not be able to...

Indicate the browse node or section of the Amazon website where the product will be assigned. This allows customers to find the product on the website easily. If you don't provide a node or if you provide an incorrect node, customers may not be able to...

Indicate the browse node or section of the Amazon website where the product will be assigned. This allows customers to find the product on the website easily. If you don't provide a node or if you provide an incorrect node, customers may not be able to...

Indicate the browse node or section of the Amazon website where the product will be assigned. This allows customers to find the product on the website easily. If you don't provide a node or if you provide an incorrect node, customers may not be able to...
Provide the manufacturer 's model number for the item
Provide the company that manufactures the product.
The UN specified purchasing/taxonomy code corresponding to the item
Provide the product's NSN identifier
The URL where the main offer-specific image of the product is located.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL where an image of a color swatch from the product is located

Provide a text description of the product. This information will appear in paragraph form on the detail page of your product. Include unique product features, product line details, and product specifications. Do not use all caps.

Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Do NOT use all caps or abbreviat...

Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Do NOT use all caps or abbreviat...

Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Do NOT use all caps or abbreviat...

Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Do NOT use all caps or abbreviat...

Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Do NOT use all caps or abbreviat...
Provide any terms that may be relevant to customer searches. No repetition, no competitor brand names or ASINs.
Provide the style of the product. Style refers to the aesthetic choices of a person or a group of people. It describes the distinctive visual representation of a product
Provide the total number of identical items in the selling unit to the customer
Select from the list or provide a customer-facing one to two-word phrase that describes the type of item the product is.
Provide the color of the product
Provide the size of the item
Provide the part number. For many products, this will be identical to the model number however some manufacturers distinguish part number from model number
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) for the product's manufacturer
Provide the phone models this product is compatible with
Provide the phone models this product is compatible with
Provide the phone models this product is compatible with

For products that are consumed by volume, weight, linear dimension, etc., provide the net quantity that would be shipped to a customer who orders one ASIN (e.g. 12 pack of 6 floz. bottles of water = 72, vs. a single 2 liter bottle = 2). For products co...
For items consumed by volume, weight, linear dimension etc., provide the unit of measure listed on the products. For products consumed as individual units, enter: count

Provide the date the product launches and should first be shown on the Amazon website (YYYY-MM-DD format). PSLD does not impact buyability or pre-order logic, it is used to indicate when a product will be visible and searchable on the Amazon website
Specify the items that are included with this product
Specify the items that are included with this product
Specify the items that are included with this product
Specify the items that are included with this product
Specify the items that are included with this product
Store external product entity information. "HSN" for India marketplace.
Store external product information for a given key. For example 6 to 8-digit HSN for India marketplace.
Provide the mechanism used to control the item for standard operations.
Provide the mechanism used to control the item for standard operations.
Provide the mechanism used to control the item for standard operations.
Provide the mechanism used to control the item for standard operations.
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) of the importer of the product. The Importer is the person who brings the product into a country for sale
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) of the importer of the product. The Importer is the person who brings the product into a country for sale
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) of the importer of the product. The Importer is the person who brings the product into a country for sale
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) of the importer of the product. The Importer is the person who brings the product into a country for sale
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) of the importer of the product. The Importer is the person who brings the product into a country for sale
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) for the packer of the product. The packer is the person who does the primary pre-packaging of the product when it is not the manufacturer.
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) for the packer of the product. The packer is the person who does the primary pre-packaging of the product when it is not the manufacturer.
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) for the packer of the product. The packer is the person who does the primary pre-packaging of the product when it is not the manufacturer.
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) for the packer of the product. The packer is the person who does the primary pre-packaging of the product when it is not the manufacturer.
Provide the contact information (including address, zipcode) for the packer of the product. The packer is the person who does the primary pre-packaging of the product when it is not the manufacturer.
Provide whether the products meets environmental impact reduction criteria established under Japan's Green Purchasing Law
Please indicate whether the offer should be skipped and a buyable offer should not be created. A value of "Yes", means no offer will be created.
Provide the actual condition type of the product
Provide descriptive text explaining the actual condition of the item
Enter the product tax code supplied to you by Amazon.com
Provide the merchant release date using YYYY-MM-DD format
Provide the maximum number of units of the item that can be purchased in a single order.
If you can print a gift message with the item indicate that here. If left blank, defaults to 'No'
If you can gift wrap an item indicate that here. If left blank, defaults to 'No'
The URL where the main offer-specific image of the product is located
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
The URL for additional images of your product. These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.
Provide the type of accessory included in the non-new product.
Provide the battery health information of the non-new product if it includes batteries.
Provide the overall cosmetic condition of the non-new product.
Provide the refurbishment type of the non-new product.
Provide the refurbishment type of the non-new product.
Provide the refurbishment type of the non-new product.
Provide the refurbishment type of the non-new product.
Provide the refurbishment type of the non-new product.
Provide the functional condition of the non-new product.
Provide the packaging type of the non-new product
Provide the information on how the non-new product was sourced.
For those merchants using Amazon fulfillment services, this designates which fulfillment network will be used. Specifying a value other than DEFAULT will cancel the Merchant-fulfilled offering.
Enter the quantity of the item you are making available for sale. This is your current inventory commitment (as a whole number)
Provide the time, in days, between when you receive an order for an item and when you can ship the item
Date that product will be restocked

Always available inventory is an alternative to quantity that allows inventory to never deplete. Enabling or disabling will toggle this feature on or off. Note that a quantity cannot be specified when provided.
Provide base price of the item at which it is being offered to the intended buyer segment (Sell on Amazon)

Provide the maximum retail price that is physically printed on pre-packaged products by manufacturer according to legal metrology act. This is the maximum price that seller can charge a customer. This is only applicable to IN Marketplace. (Sell on Amazon)
The pricing rule that will automate price on this offer (Sell on Amazon)
Provide the minimum seller allowed price (Sell on Amazon)
Provide the maximum seller allowed price (Sell on Amazon)
The price at which you offer the product for sale. (Sell on Amazon)
The date that the sale price will begin to override the product's standard price; the sale price will be displayed after 0:00AM of Sale From Date. (Sell on Amazon)
The last date that the sale price will override the item's standard price; the product's standard price will be displayed after 0:00AM of Sale End Date. (Sell on Amazon)
Your price start date (Sell on Amazon)
Your price end date (Sell on Amazon)
Provide base price of the item at which it is being offered to the intended buyer segment (Amazon Business (B2B))

Provide the maximum retail price that is physically printed on pre-packaged products by manufacturer according to legal metrology act. This is the maximum price that seller can charge a customer. This is only applicable to IN Marketplace. (Amazon Busin...
Provide the minimum seller allowed price (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide the maximum seller allowed price (Amazon Business (B2B))
Your price start date (Amazon Business (B2B))
Your price end date (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide whether the quantity price type is fixed, a price set in local currency for each quantity threshold, or a percentage of business price (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide the minimum purchase quantity necessary to receive the discount. It will apply to all units if the quantity threshold is met. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide the quantity price for each quantity threshold or the discount percentage offered on the business price for each quantity threshold. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide the minimum purchase quantity necessary to receive the discount. It will apply to all units if the quantity threshold is met. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide the quantity price for each quantity threshold or the discount percentage offered on the business price for each quantity threshold. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide the minimum purchase quantity necessary to receive the discount. It will apply to all units if the quantity threshold is met. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide the quantity price for each quantity threshold or the discount percentage offered on the business price for each quantity threshold. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide the minimum purchase quantity necessary to receive the discount. It will apply to all units if the quantity threshold is met. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide the quantity price for each quantity threshold or the discount percentage offered on the business price for each quantity threshold. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide the minimum purchase quantity necessary to receive the discount. It will apply to all units if the quantity threshold is met. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Provide the quantity price for each quantity threshold or the discount percentage offered on the business price for each quantity threshold. (Amazon Business (B2B))
Shipping Templates define your shipping regions and fees. Amazon assigns a default template, which you can modify or configure additional templates in your Shipping Settings.
Provide the item length as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Item Length. If a value is provided for Item Length, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the item width as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Item Width. If a value is provided for Item Width, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the item height as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Item Height. If a value is provided for Item Height, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the package length as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Package Length. If a value is provided for Package Length, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the package width as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Package Width. If a value is provided for Package Width, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the package height as a numeric value.
Select the unit of measure for Package Height. If a value is provided for Package Height, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
This attribute represents the weight of the item plus the packaging. If your item is shipped to the customer in multiple packages, enter the dimensions of the heaviest package
Select the unit of measure for Package Weight. If a value is provided for Package Weight, you must also enter the corresponding unit.
Provide the number of boxes that the product will be shipped in
Select the product's country of origin
Provide a description of the product's warranty
Provide a description of the product's warranty
Provide a description of the product's warranty
Select "yes" if batteries are required to power the item (or if the item is a battery) or "no" if they are not. Please note that an internal rechargeable battery is also considered a battery

Select "yes" if batteries are contained in the product (e.g. batteries inside a pair of Bluetooth headphones) and/or included with the product (e.g. batteries packed separately with a camera), otherwise select "no"
Select the chemical composition of the battery cell
Provide the components of the item's battery cell that are not already listed under battery cell composition.
Provide the total net weight (numeric value) of the batteries included. This is the weight of the standalone batteries not including packaging or the device it may be used in.
Provide unit for battery weight
Specify the number of batteries needed to power the item. If batteries are included with the item be sure to account for spare batteries provided
Provide battery type needed to power the item, including spares if included. Some options may be moved under other attribute eg. IEC code
Specify the number of batteries needed to power the item. If batteries are included with the item be sure to account for spare batteries provided
Provide battery type needed to power the item, including spares if included. Some options may be moved under other attribute eg. IEC code
Specify the number of batteries needed to power the item. If batteries are included with the item be sure to account for spare batteries provided
Provide battery type needed to power the item, including spares if included. Some options may be moved under other attribute eg. IEC code
Specify the number of batteries needed to power the item. If batteries are included with the item be sure to account for spare batteries provided
Provide battery type needed to power the item, including spares if included. Some options may be moved under other attribute eg. IEC code
Specify the number of batteries needed to power the item. If batteries are included with the item be sure to account for spare batteries provided
Provide battery type needed to power the item, including spares if included. Some options may be moved under other attribute eg. IEC code
Specify the total number of Lithium Metal cells in the product where the cell isn't contained in an encased battery (e.g. coin cells)
Specify the total number of Lithium-ion cells in the product where the cell isn't contained in an encased battery. For example, an AA battery is considered a cell
Provide the total energy stored in the lithium batteries used to power the item, measured in Watt Hours.
Select the corresponding unit

Select “in equipment” if the battery is contained in the item . Select “with equipment” if the battery is packed separately with the device it is meant to power. Select “only” if the product is a battery sold alone or with items it is not meant to power.
Provide the weight of lithium contained in the cell or battery as a numeric value
Select the corresponding weight unit
Provide the regulations that apply to the item if it is classified as a dangerous good, hazardous material, substance, or waste.
Provide the regulations that apply to the item if it is classified as a dangerous good, hazardous material, substance, or waste.
Provide the regulations that apply to the item if it is classified as a dangerous good, hazardous material, substance, or waste.
Provide the regulations that apply to the item if it is classified as a dangerous good, hazardous material, substance, or waste.
Provide the regulations that apply to the item if it is classified as a dangerous good, hazardous material, substance, or waste.

Select the GHS Class of the product from the list of valid values if GHS is selected as the Dangerous Goods Regulation. GHS Class indicates the warning statement assigned by the GHS classification system.

Select the GHS Class of the product from the list of valid values if GHS is selected as the Dangerous Goods Regulation. GHS Class indicates the warning statement assigned by the GHS classification system.

Select the GHS Class of the product from the list of valid values if GHS is selected as the Dangerous Goods Regulation. GHS Class indicates the warning statement assigned by the GHS classification system.

Select the GHS Class of the product from the list of valid values if GHS is selected as the Dangerous Goods Regulation. GHS Class indicates the warning statement assigned by the GHS classification system.

Select the GHS Class of the product from the list of valid values if GHS is selected as the Dangerous Goods Regulation. GHS Class indicates the warning statement assigned by the GHS classification system.
Select the aspect or regulatory body used for the hazardous product information
Provide hazmat information that is relevant to the product based on the aspect selected
Provide the web address for the Safety Data Sheet, containing essential safety information for potentially hazardous materials.
Provide the item weight numeric value (not including the packaging)
Provide unit for item weight
Provide whether the product is subject to buyer age restrictions. These can influence the purchase and/or delivery of the product.
Select applicable regulation type
Provide the regulatory identification associated with the regulation type.
Select applicable regulation type
Provide the regulatory identification associated with the regulation type.
Select applicable regulation type
Provide the regulatory identification associated with the regulation type.
Select applicable regulation type
Provide the regulatory identification associated with the regulation type.
Select applicable regulation type
Provide the regulatory identification associated with the regulation type.
Provide the email address or URL for the EU Responsible Person, representing the product in compliance with EU regulations.
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Application Guide)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Certificate of Analysis)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Certificate of Compliance)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Compatibility Guide)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Data Act Transparency Declaration)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Emergency Use Authorization)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Emergency Use Authorization Amendment)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Installation Manual)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Instructions for Use)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Patient Fact Sheet)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Product Certificate of Conformity)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Provider Fact Sheet)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Safety Data Sheet)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Safety Information)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Specification Sheet)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Troubleshooting Guide)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, User Guide)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, User Manual)
Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser. (en_IN, Warranty)
Check “yes” if your product doesn’t have any warning and safety information, as it can be used safely and as intended without it.
Provide the email or URL of the manufacturer. If you’ve submitted this information for the brand before, use the same email or URL.
Provide whether the item can be shipped globally by Amazon
Provide the GHS chemical hazard codes for the chemical substance/mixture in order to display warnings to customers.
Provide the GHS chemical hazard codes for the chemical substance/mixture in order to display warnings to customers.
Provide the GHS chemical hazard codes for the chemical substance/mixture in order to display warnings to customers.
Provide the GHS chemical hazard codes for the chemical substance/mixture in order to display warnings to customers.
Provide the GHS chemical hazard codes for the chemical substance/mixture in order to display warnings to customers.
Provide the time period within which the warranty can be availed for the base product.
Provide the corresponding unit used to designate the item's base product manufacturer warranty period.
Provide the terms and conditions associated with the warranty provided by the manufacturer for the product.
Provide the steps to be followed to avail manufacturing warranty.
Provide the contact details (e-mail and phone number) of the warranty service provider.
Provide the name of the specific part for which the warranty duration is different from base warranty.
Provide the time period for which the warranty coverage is valid for the specific part or component of the product.
Provide the corresponding unit used to designate the duration of the warranty for the specific part or component of the product.
Provide the terms and conditions associated with the warranty provided by the manufacturer for the specific part.
